notes: Controlled vocabulary of removal categories. Debuffs (curation/debuffs.json) tag themselves with removableBy[]; removers (curation/removers.json) tag themselves with provides[]. A removal is possible iff those sets intersect.

kind: 'school' = friendly dispel school (Magic/Curse/Disease/Poison). 'mechanic' = movement/CC mechanic (snare/root/stun/silence) cleared by Freedom-likes/Tiger's Lust/Swift Art. 'special' = neither a school nor a clean mechanic (bleed, healing-absorb). 'enrage' = hostile soothe.

logSignature: 'dispel-event' = removal fires a SPELL_DISPEL naming the removed aura via extraSpellId (clean to score). VERIFIED from logs that this covers MECHANIC removals too — e.g. Tiger's Lust (116841) and Swift Art (450627) removing Chains of Subjugation each emit SPELL_DISPEL. 'heal-through' = not removed by a spell; cleared by healing through the absorb (track time-to-clear, not a cleanse). 'inferred' is currently unused — detection is uniformly SPELL_DISPEL except heal-through.

categories.label: Enrage
categories.notes: Removed FROM enemies (soothe), e.g. Tranquilizing Shot / Soothe.

categories.label: Bleed
categories.notes: Physical, not school-dispellable; cleared only by specific cleanses (Stoneform, Cauterizing Flame), which fire SPELL_DISPEL like other active removals. Many bleeds are simply not removable.

categories.label: Healing Absorb
categories.notes: Not dispellable; removed by healing through the absorb. Track time-to-clear.

categories.label: Snare
categories.notes: Movement slow; cleared by Freedom-likes. Often bundled with a damage component on one aura; the removal clears the whole aura and fires SPELL_DISPEL.
